title: Fix Nox runner compatibility and ASan target scoping

source.subject: ci: fix nox runner compatibility and ASan target scoping

body:
Fixes **Nox runner** compatibility and scopes **ASan** targets correctly in CI matrices.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`4bc2540`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/4bc2540)
- **Subject:** ci: fix nox runner compatibility and ASan target scoping
- **Completed:** 2026-04-14

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Stabilizes aggregate workflows after **ci-nox-migration**.
